creator: sylvio@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

This patch is wrong. It was updated to 1.52r79, but the distinfo file =
has not changed, The port have not directory "files" and too have not =
file "patch-screenshot.cpp" to you create a diff of =
"patch-screenshot.cpp.orig".
The line "$FreeBSD: ports...." is changed, this is wrong.=20
Please, do download via "cvs co snes9x-gtk" for example, update and =
later send a new patch.

--- ---
Sylvio Cesar Teixeira || FreeBSD Committer
www.scjamorim.org    || http://people.freebsd.org/~sylvio
http://people.freebsd.org/~sylvio/sylvio-pub.key

=93For I know the plans I have for you," declares the LORD, "plans to =
prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future. =
Then you will call upon me and come and pray to me, and I will listen to =
you. You will seek me and find me when you seek me with all your =
heart.=94- Jeremiah 29:11-13
